title: vitaceae
intro: The taxonomical rank of Vitaceae is a family of plants. It is a botanical family that includes species commonly known as grapevines and kiwifruit. The family Vitaceae is characterized by its woody vines or shrubs, with simple or compound leaves and small, often berry-like fruits. This family comprises about 14 to 17 genera, including Vitis, Ampelopsis, and Cayratia, among others.
